value: Great question! The steps depend on which platform you're using. On PlayStation, you can view your purchase history by going to Settings > Account Management > Account Information > Wallet > Transaction History. For Xbox, you'll want to check your account settings and look for "Purchase history" or "Order history." On iPhone, you can see your App Store purchase history by opening the App Store app, tapping your profile icon, and selecting "Purchase history" — this will show your app and in-app purchases. Let me know if you need help navigating any of these or if you're looking for something different!
